listCustomWeapons.name: Yklwa of Zephyrus
listCustomWeapons.description:
A minor wind spirit resides within this finely crafted yklwa, its presence revealed by the faint hum of moving air that surrounds the weapon. The spirit eagerly answers displays of speed and daring, lending its power to those who invest the weapon. By feeding the spirit magical energy, the wielder can unleash the devastating technique known as Zephyr's Piercer. Though incapable of speech, the spirit is playful and restless, delighting in open skies, swift movement, and audacious acts.

The spirit bound within the weapon refuses all but its chosen bloodline, preventing any other creature from investing the yklwa.

Weapon +1 striking yklwa.

Granted Abilities Wind Recall, Zephyr's Piercer. After using Zephyr's Piercer, apply the Zephyr's Wake buff until the start of your next turn.
listCustomWeapons.action0desc:
Zephyr's Piercer
See the separate custom feat/action entry for the full rules text. Apply the Zephyr's Wake buff after use.
listCustomWeapons.weaponTraits: 3rd Party, Unique, Magical, Invested, Air, Finesse, Thrown 20ft, Versatile S

listCustomWeapons.name: Yklwa
listCustomWeapons.description:
Originating in distant lands, a yklwa consists of a short wooden shaft topped by an unusually long spearhead. Though compact enough to wield in one hand, its elongated blade grants it surprising striking power when used in close quarters or hurled at a distant foe.

Damage 1d8 piercing
Group Spear
Traits Finesse, Thrown 20 ft., Versatile S

listCustomWeapons.name: Awakened Yklwa of Zephyrus
listCustomWeapons.description:
The spirit within the yklwa has begun to wake, recognising its chosen wielder through quickened winds, playful gusts, and warning whistles. It understands speech and can communicate simple intent and emotion through changes in the surrounding air.

Weapon +2 greater striking yklwa.

Granted Abilities Wind Recall, Zephyr's Piercer, Gale Step. While wielding and invested in this weapon, apply the Zephyr's Grace buff.
listCustomWeapons.action0desc:
Zephyr's Piercer
See the separate custom feat/action entry for the full rules text. This weapon also grants Gale Step and Zephyr's Grace.
listCustomWeapons.weaponTraits: 3rd Party, Unique, Magical, Invested, Air, Finesse, Thrown 20ft, Versatile S

listCustomWeapons.name: Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus
listCustomWeapons.description:
The wind spirit within the yklwa is fully awake, its voice carried in sudden whispers of Auran and distant sky-song. It remembers fragments of its ancient service to Zephyrus and moves with its wielder as a trusted ancestral companion rather than a mere enchantment.

Weapon +3 major striking yklwa.

Granted Abilities Wind Recall, Zephyr's Piercer, Gale Step, Gale Ascension. While wielding and invested in this weapon, apply the Zephyr's Grace buff.

Exalted Zephyr's Piercer When you use Zephyr's Piercer with the Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus, after resolving all Strikes, you may teleport to any unoccupied space adjacent to a creature struck by the activity.
listCustomWeapons.action0desc:
Exalted Zephyr's Piercer
See the separate custom feat/action entry for the full rules text. This version adds the exalted teleport effect after resolving the activity.
listCustomWeapons.weaponTraits: 3rd Party, Unique, Magical, Invested, Air, Finesse, Thrown 20ft, Versatile S

listCustomFeats.name: Zephyr's Piercer
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
Requirements You are wielding and invested in the Yklwa of Zephyrus, Awakened Yklwa of Zephyrus, or Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus.

You channel magical energy into the wind spirit inhabiting the yklwa, expending a spell slot of 1st rank or higher.

Stride up to twice your Speed in a straight line. During this movement, you may move through enemy spaces and your movement does not trigger reactions.

Make a Strike against each creature whose space you pass through. These Strikes do not increase your multiple attack penalty until all Strikes have been resolved.

Each Strike that hits deals additional force damage equal to a number of d8s equal to the rank of the expended spell slot.

After resolving all Strikes, your multiple attack penalty increases as though you had made three attacks. You gain Zephyr's Wake until the start of your next turn.

Exalted If you use this activity while wielding the Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus, after resolving all Strikes, you may teleport to any unoccupied space adjacent to a creature struck by this activity.
listCustomFeats.traits: 3rd Party, Custom, Unique, Air, Flourish, Magical, Move

listCustomFeats.name: Wind Recall
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
Requirements You are invested in and able to wield the Yklwa of Zephyrus, Awakened Yklwa of Zephyrus, or Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus.

You beckon to the spirit inhabiting the yklwa. If the yklwa is unattended and within 60 feet, it flies to your hand on a current of wind.

If you are wielding the Awakened Yklwa of Zephyrus, the range increases to 500 feet. If you are wielding the Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus, the yklwa can be recalled from anywhere on the same plane, provided it is unattended.
listCustomFeats.traits: 3rd Party, Custom, Unique, Air, Magical, Concentrate

listCustomFeats.name: Gale Step
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
Frequency once per 10 minutes.

Requirements You are wielding and invested in the Awakened Yklwa of Zephyrus or Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus.

The spirit lifts your step on a sudden rush of wind. Stride up to your Speed. During this movement, you ignore non-magical difficult terrain, can move across liquids, and can move through enemy spaces. You must end this movement in a space that can support you.
listCustomFeats.traits: 3rd Party, Custom, Unique, Air, Magical, Move

listCustomFeats.name: Gale Ascension
listCustomFeats.textDescription:
Frequency once per hour.

Requirements You are wielding and invested in the Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus.

The spirit bears you aloft on a powerful current of divine wind. For 1 minute, you gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, ignore non-magical difficult terrain, and are immune to falling damage.
listCustomFeats.traits: 3rd Party, Custom, Unique, Air, Magical, Move

listCustomBuffs.name: Zephyr's Wake
listCustomBuffs.description:
Turbulent winds continue to swirl around you after unleashing Zephyr's Piercer.

Until the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against ranged attacks.

listCustomBuffs.name: Zephyr's Grace
listCustomBuffs.description:
The awakened spirit of Zephyrus carries you upon the wind.

While wielding and invested in the Awakened Yklwa of Zephyrus or Exalted Yklwa of Zephyrus, you gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed and treat all falls as though they were 20 feet shorter.

Remove this buff if you are no longer wielding and invested in the weapon.
